title: 10 years of AlphaGo: The turning point for AI | Thore Graepel & Pushmeet Kohli
summary: A retrospective discussion marking ten years since AlphaGo defeated world champion Lee Sedol at Go in 2016. The video reflects on how this match catalyzed the modern AI revolution and laid the foundation for subsequent AI breakthroughs, from algorithmic discovery to protein folding solutions.
